title: PostLog
description: A log entry for a Facebook post made through the Publish to Facebook plugin.

submissionId.description: The ID of the submission that was posted.

status.description: The result status of the post attempt.

facebookPostId.description: The Facebook post ID returned on success.

message.description: The message text that was sent to Facebook.

errorMessage.description: The error message returned by Facebook on failure.

link.description: The URL that was shared in the post.

datePosted.description: The date and time when the post was attempted.
